lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is free of scratches, dents, or paint chips. The interior upholstery is clean and shows no signs of wear. All mechanical components, including the engine and transmission, function as intended.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been consistently well-maintained. The exterior paint still holds a nice shine, though you will find a few minor stone chips and light surface scratches upon close inspection. The interior is clean and well-preserved, with only slight wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, it remains very reliable and drives smoothly, offering a great balance of quality and value for its next owner.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts! Here’s your chance to tackle a rewarding restoration project. While this car is in poor condition and requires significant mechanical and cosmetic attention, it offers a solid foundation for someone looking to customize a vehicle exactly to their liking. Grab this bargain today!
This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and minor dents. The interior shows significant wear. All mechanical systems are currently functional.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or a complete restoration. The engine suffers from a heavy knock and significant fluid leaks, and the transmission is currently non-functional. The body shows advanced corrosion on the rocker panels and frame, along with multiple dents and fading paint. Inside, the cabin has seen better days with significant upholstery damage and missing trim pieces. This vehicle is not roadworthy and will need to be towed.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both engineering excellence and sustained reliability. This unit offers a refined driving experience, balancing sophisticated aesthetics with a robust mechanical pedigree. Thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a high-caliber automobile at a compelling value proposition.

Hey everyone! I’m selling my trusty ride, and it’s been such a joy to own. It's in really solid shape and has plenty of life left in it! Whether you're commuting or heading out on a road trip, this beauty runs smoothly and is ready for its next adventure. I’ve taken good care of it, so you can just hop in and go. Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to see it go to a great home!

Offered is a 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six powerplant with individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM ceiling. This chassis remains rigid with documented subframe reinforcement and a recently serviced VANOS system to ensure precise valve timing. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission to a factory variable M-differential. The suspension geometry is dialed in with refreshed bushings and Bilstein dampers, providing exceptional lateral grip. While the exterior shows honest patina consistent with its age, the mechanical vitals are robust, exhibiting strong compression across all cylinders and a leak-free undercarriage. A purist’
Used vehicle in good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Title in hand.

This meticulously maintained luxury sedan offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior features a deep metallic finish that shines beautifully, with only minor road wear consistent with careful driving. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and clean, complemented by a smoke-free cabin and a suite of fully functional technology features. Mechanically, the vehicle is sound, having received regular synthetic oil changes and recent brake service. It handles the road with precision and provides a quiet, composed ride. This is a reliable, high-quality vehicle ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies reliability and sustained performance. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a balanced combination of luxury and utility, it represents an exceptional value for the discerning driver. Experience the confidence of purchasing from a premier establishment dedicated to excellence in the pre-owned market.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and refined aesthetics. This unit has been subjected to a comprehensive multi-point inspection to guarantee mechanical integrity and roadworthiness. With a documented service history and a preserved interior, it stands as a testament to diligent ownership, providing a reliable and sophisticated driving experience for the discerning professional.

Hey there! I’m so excited to find a new home for my favorite ride! 🚗 It’s been super reliable and is in really solid shape—honestly, it still drives like a dream and looks great parked in the driveway. I’ve taken really good care of it, so it’s totally ready for all your upcoming adventures. You’re going to love how it handles! Feel free to reach out if you want to come see it!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and a crisp ZF 6-speed manual. The chassis remains taut with a reinforced subframe and updated bushings, while the variable M differential lock ensures optimal torque distribution. Recently serviced VANOS and a shimmed valve train maintain peak volumetric efficiency. While showing minor aesthetic patina consistent with its mileage, the mechanical integrity and throttle response are sharp, making it a formidable driver’s tool.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. No mechanical issues. Ready for drive.

This exceptionally well-maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though a keen eye might find a few minor stone chips on the front bumper consistent with careful highway use. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary; the premium upholstery is free of tears or stains, and all electronics, from the intuitive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, function exactly as they should. Mechanically, this car has been pampered with a full service history, recent oil change, and a fresh set of tires. It drives smooth and quiet, with a responsive engine and firm braking. While not a showroom floor model, it is a truly clean, dependable example that has many miles of enjoyment left to offer. No accidents, smoke-free, and always garaged.

This exceptional vehicle offers a sophisticated driving experience, characterized by its reliable performance and well-preserved aesthetics. Meticulously inspected by our certified technicians, it maintains a high standard of mechanical integrity and interior comfort. An ideal acquisition for those seeking premium quality and lasting value.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This specimen has been curated to ensure a superior driving experience, offering a seamless balance of performance and reliability. A premier opportunity for the discerning professional seeking a high-caliber automobile with a documented history of consistent care.

Hey there! I'm parting with my trusty ride and it’s been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me over the years. It runs smoothly, looks great, and is totally ready for its next adventure with a new owner! You're going to love how it handles—perfect for daily commutes or weekend trips. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This meticulously maintained 2017 Porsche Macan S represents a fantastic opportunity for the discerning driver. Finished in a sophisticated Volcano Grey Metallic, the bodywork is in excellent shape, displaying a deep shine with only the lightest evidence of road use. The interior is a smoke-free sanctuary, featuring Agate Grey leather that remains supple and well-preserved. Every feature, from the panoramic glass roof to the premium surround sound system, operates perfectly. Under the hood, the twin-turbo V6 delivers smooth, authoritative power, supported by a documented service history and a recently completed multi-point inspection. With crisp handling and a clean title, this vehicle offers a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag. Ready for immediate enjoyment.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Its current state reflects a commitment to consistent care, ensuring a driving experience that meets our exacting standards for reliability and quality. This offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking both value and distinction.
